problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Federated. Federated learning without data centralization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
